transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my main sewer line is leaking and it's getting bad! This is Sarah Johnson at 640 Willow Way. Dispatcher: Okay Sarah, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 640 Willow Way right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: main sewer line is leaking
